mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, ref_project_id, ref_scm_id, ref_scm_type, scm_repo_space, scm_repo_name, scm_repo_url, scm_repo_branch, scm_repo_event, scm_repo_script, scm_repo_hook_pwd, enable_hook, ds_id, ds_type, ds_instance, ds_desc, ds_path, devops_options, devops_hashcode, callback_url, callback_method, enable_callback, enable_trigger, trigger_token, enable, deleted
mapper.select:
select
from dm_project_devops where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id in #{item}

select
from dm_project_devops where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ds_id = #{dsId} and enable = 1 and deleted = 0 order by gmt_create asc

select
from dm_project_devops where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_scm_id= #{scmId} and enable = 1 and deleted = 0 order by gmt_create asc

select
from dm_project_devops where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and enable = 1 and deleted = 0 and devops_hashcode= #{scmHash} order by gmt_create asc

select
from dm_project_devops where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id= #{projectId} and deleted = 0 order by gmt_create asc

select
from dm_project_devops where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{devopsId} limit 1
mapper.update: update dm_project_devops set enable = 0, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_scm_id = #{scmId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set deleted = 1, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable = 1, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable = 0, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable_hook = 1, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable_hook = 0, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable_trigger = 1, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable_trigger = 0, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0

update dm_project_devops set callback_method = #{httpMethod}, callback_url = #{httpUrl}, enable_callback = #{enable}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0

update dm_project_devops set trigger_token = #{token}, enable_trigger = #{enable}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{devopsId} and deleted = 0
update dm_project_devops set enable = 0, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
